description: Valentina Torres (patient identifier: BAH000023) is a 40-year-old female who has been brought to the emergency room by her family presenting with fever for 5 days, productive cough, and difficulty breathing. After initial assessment, the medical officer has decided she requires inpatient admission for suspected Community-Acquired Pneumonia. Access Bahmni at https://localhost/bahmni/home (login: superman / Admin123). Complete the inpatient admission workflow for Valentina Torres, ensuring all entries are linked to a new inpatient visit and encounter. This includes recording her presenting vital signs (temperature, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, and blood pressure), documenting at least two clinical diagnoses including Pneumonia and one additional relevant diagnosis, writing a clinical admission note of at least 150 characters summarizing the complaint and plan, and prescribing at least two appropriate inpatient medications for pneumonia treatment.
